description_long: This is a modern, light gray upholstered couch with a rectangular, boxy silhouette and clean lines. The couch features two large, square backrest cushions and a matching seat, both with subtle tufted detailing. A dramatic and unusual element is present: a long, blood-stained spear has pierced through the backrest and seat, leaving a large, dark red bloodstain on the right side of the couch. The legs are short, dark, and slightly angled, providing a stable base. The armrests are straight and squared, matching the overall geometric design. The upholstery appears to be a woven fabric, and there are no visible accent pillows.
description: A modern light gray couch with squared arms and tufted cushions, dramatically pierced by a blood-stained spear and marked with a large bloodstain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full couch, the bloodstain on the right seat and backrest, and the spear entering from the back and exiting the front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spear protruding through the couch and the squared armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the spear's entry point and bloodstain on the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view with the spear extending outward and the bloodstain visible on the seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all integrated and tufted; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with subtle square tufting on both seat and backrest surfaces.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, dark legs with a slight outward angle, likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, squared armrests at full seat height, matching the couch's geometric form and covered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: High, divided backrest with two large, attached, tufted cushions; continuous in height and integrated into the frame.
